Build Surface

Guides for Building with Wunderland

The shortest path from install to production is: get the CLI running, understand the library-first API, then layer extensions, discovery, and speech on top of the same runtime.

Start Here

The minimum path from zero to a running agent, both as a CLI app and as an embedded library.

Installation

Install Wunderland, verify prerequisites, and prepare your first config.

Read Installation

Quickstart

Go from install to a running agent session in a few commands.

Open Quickstart

Configuration

Understand providers, security defaults, presets, and agent config fields.

View Config Guide

Build & Runtime

The core building blocks for local agents, extension loading, discovery, and voice-capable sessions.

Library-First API

Use `createWunderland()` as the high-level runtime entry point in your own app.

Open Library Guide

Extensions

Load curated tools, providers, and runtime packs through the registry.

Open Extensions Guide

Capability Discovery

Keep tool exposure narrow and relevant with discovery-driven loading.

Learn Discovery

Speech Runtime

Wunderland now uses the shared AgentOS `speech-runtime` for STT, TTS, VAD, and provider switching.

Open Speech Runtime Docs

Integrations & Operations

Connect channels, configure providers, and deploy with current operational defaults.

Channels

Wire agents into messaging platforms and social surfaces.

Open Channels Guide

CLI Command Reference

Full command surface including setup, chat, voice, extensions, and diagnostics.

Open CLI Reference

Local-First Deployment

Run locally first, then scale into hosted or hybrid deployment targets.

Read Deployment Guide

AgentOS Integration

See how Wunderland sits on top of AgentOS core, extensions, and skills.

View Architecture

Recommended Start

Start with docs, validate locally, then scale

Wunderland is easiest to reason about when you begin with the CLI and a local-first config, then mirror the same extensions and `speech-runtime` settings inside embedded library usage.

Install WunderlandLibrary APISpeech Runtime
